name: Improper Enforcement of Behavioral Workflow
description: The product does not properly enforce that users follow a required sequence of steps or behavioral workflow, allowing attackers to skip steps, perform actions out of order, or omit required operations to bypass security controls or manipulate business logic.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[action_request] reaches TRANSFORM[privileged_operation] or STORAGE[protected_resource] without passing through the required sequence of CONTROL[workflow_step] nodes (e.g., authentication before file access, checkout before payment), allowing step-skipping attacks
